panels.title: Cert Rotation Rate
panels.description: Rate of SDS certificate updates. Active rotation = healthy mTLS.

panels.title: mTLS Cert Expiry
panels.description: 0 is normal — Kuma rotates mTLS certs every 24h

panels.title: Upstream Endpoint Health
panels.description: Health ratio per destination (healthy/total). Green = 100%, yellow = degraded, red = unhealthy.

panels.title: Circuit Breaker State
panels.description: Any circuit breaker open per destination. Green = all closed (OK), red = at least one CB open (rq, cx, or pending).

panels.title: LB Panic Mode Rate
panels.description: Rate of load balancer panic mode events per destination. Panic mode activates when too few healthy hosts are available, routing traffic to unhealthy hosts to avoid complete failure.
